rankings.reason: Best alignment with the 2050 futuristic theme, incorporating sustainable tech, VR, and seamless biometric automation.
Highly creative concept of aerial capsules, though it focuses more on city transit than airport terminal experience.
Provides a solid narrative, but the conveyer belt concept feels less innovative than the other futuristic proposals.
Too grounded in current technology; lacks the visionary, high-tech flair expected for a 2050 design project.
